name: Jon Ajinga
title: Writer, editor, and independent publisher
bio: Jon Ajinga is the founding editor of The Freethinking Times, covering regulation, institutional power, and the life of ideas.
bioLong:
Jon Ajinga founded The Freethinking Times in 2025 as an independent publication for long-form reporting and analysis, the kind of work mainstream outlets increasingly can't afford to do and platform publishers won't.

Before The Freethinking Times he worked as a software engineer, an organiser, and (briefly, badly) a bartender. He reads too much philosophy and not enough fiction. His coverage focuses on regulatory capture, administrative agencies, and the quiet institutional decisions that shape public life.

He lives in Denver with his family and a very opinionated cat.
